topic.title: evidence-reference
topic.shortdesc: Escape-hatch artifacts and evidence-only material such as raw SQL or external snippets.

section.title: Raw migration evidence
section.p: Keep low-level evidence without pretending it is structured lifecycle guidance.

ul.li: Raw migration adds release_packets.approval_snapshot as immutable JSONB evidence.
Raw SQL evidence stays in the evidence layer and is not loaded on cold start.
Raw artifacts preserve facts but reduce structured traversability.

section.codeblock:
"ALTER TABLE release_packets ADD COLUMN approval_snapshot JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb;
-- Raw migration adds release_packets.approval_snapshot as immutable JSONB evidence.
-- Raw SQL evidence stays in the evidence layer and is not loaded on cold start.
-- Raw artifacts preserve facts but reduce structured traversability.
"
